steps.title: Recognize the two-part requirement
steps.content: The student's goal is to present both the Quanhucun study and its conclusions. The study is the bone fragment analysis; the conclusion is that domestication may have occurred.

steps.title: Match the study and conclusion
steps.content:
B directly presents both the study (2013 analysis of bone fragments from Quanhucun) and its conclusion (cats may have been domesticated 5,300 years ago).

The other three present only partial information—A and D address study details without the conclusion; C focuses on diet evidence without stating the finding.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
